title: Botswana Sentence Builder
description: A progressive collection of 1,000 English sentences for learners in Botswana, moving from simple daily phrases to complex written expression.

phases.title: The Building Blocks
phases.style: Short, simple English sentences used in daily Botswana life.

sentences.text: Even though the harvest was not as good as last year, we are still hopeful that the next rainy season will bring enough water for the cattle at the post.
